contracts.job: Route the user to the right phase skill for their current work item
must_produce: work item menu or phase skill invocation
contracts.handoff: User is in the correct phase skill or has selected a work item

contracts.job: Context-aware work item management: evidence synthesis, CRUD, and lifecycle
must_produce: work item document with structured updates
contracts.handoff: Work item is updated with current evidence and proposed changes

contracts.job: Structured implementation with root-cause debugging, 4-phase lifecycle Phase 2
must_produce: implementation with root cause analysis where needed
must_not_do: fix without root cause investigation first (defects)
contracts.handoff: Implementation complete, handoff block written with next suggested phase
allowed_side_effects: writes journal entries and handoff to work item file

contracts.job: Code review wrapper that sets up work item context and delegates to /review
contracts.handoff: Context is set up, user is directed to run /review
allowed_side_effects: writes journal entry and handoff to work item file

contracts.job: Ship wrapper that validates TEST-SPEC acceptance criteria and delegates to /ship
must_not_do: ship without validating specs (for items with TEST-SPEC)
contracts.handoff: Context is set up, user is directed to run /ship
allowed_side_effects: writes journal entry and handoff to work item file

contracts.job: Compare a PRD + ARCHITECTURE + TEST-SPEC triplet against templates, check cross-doc traceability
must_produce: per-doc template alignment report with PASS/FAIL/WARN per check
must_not_do: delete or rewrite user content during fixes
contracts.handoff: User sees a scored report and can choose to fix issues
allowed_side_effects: modifies doc files only when user approves fix mode

contracts.job: Unified test harness for /align-feature-contract: Tier 1 smoke + Tier 2 E2E
must_produce: Tier 1 smoke test results per triplet family
must_not_do: skip incomplete triplets without reporting them
contracts.handoff: User sees test results for all triplet families

contracts.job: Interactive brainstorming: premise challenges, forced alternatives, cross-model review, design doc
contracts.handoff: User has an approved design doc ready for /plan-eng-review
inputs: user's problem statement or feature idea

contracts.job: Ship workflow: merge base branch, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, create PR
contracts.handoff: PR is open and ready for review or merge
inputs: committed code on a feature branch

contracts.job: Pre-landing PR review: analyze diff for SQL safety, trust boundary violations, structural issues
contracts.handoff: User knows whether the PR is safe to merge and what to fix

contracts.job: Unified 9-layer health dashboard: config hygiene, governance, doc quality, deploy state
contracts.handoff: User has a scored health report and knows what to fix, in priority order
allowed_side_effects: writes to work-item journal when --scope targets work-items/
